C-Peptide Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/c-peptide-test/ 
C-Peptide Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a C-peptide test? 
This test measures the level of C-peptide in a sample of your blood or urine (pee). C-peptide is a chain of amino acids (the building blocks of proteins) that your pancreas makes in the process of making insulin. Insulin is a hormone that your pancreas makes to help blood glucose Â (blood sugar) get into your cells, where it can be used for energy. This helps keep yo
